title: ADR 0004 formatMoney is orphaned — money formatting is fragmented across 3 paths
content: Scheduled review (2026-05-28) traced money rendering app-wide. ADR 0004's drift-free formatMoney (features/ledger/lib/format.ts) has ZERO consumers — its guarantee ('what the user sees is provably what the ledger stored') is unrealized in the product. All 9 money-render sites (benchmarks x2, customers x2, tax-credits x2, wealth-score, ledger TransactionsCard) import the inferior src/lib/format.ts formatCurrency/formatSignedCurrency: USD-hardcoded, no roundMoney normalization, no fail-loud. WealthScoreCard.tsx:195 adds a 3rd inline path ($…M/$…K via toFixed). Also: features/ledger is a de-facto shared kernel (5 features import type Transaction from it), so money primitives living in features/ledger/lib creates feature->feature coupling — correct home is shared src/lib/money/. ADR 0005 (Proposed) decides: consolidate to one kernel + adopt formatMoney via back-compat wrappers, NO new primitive needed. Lesson for future reviews: an ADR being 'Accepted' with passing tests does NOT mean it's adopted — always grep for actual consumers of a new primitive before considering the area settled.

title: Session capture (Stop) — 2026-05-28 19:31 UTC
